atten2.ptxt: Wear protective gloves. Sharp areas on the seat adjuster may injure your hands.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT WIRE
INSTALL SEAT POSITION SENSOR (for Driver Side)

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the negative battery (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Engage the pin and install the seat position sensor to the seat slide position sensor protector as shown in the illustration.
Using a feeler gauge 1.5 mm (0.059 in.), temporarily install the seat position sensor.

item.ptxt: If the seat position sensor has been dropped, or there are any cracks, dents or other defects in the case or connector, replace the seat position sensor with a new one.
When installing the seat position sensor, be careful that the SRS wiring does not interfere with other parts and that it is not pinched between other parts.

atten4.ptxt: Be sure that a clearance between the seat position sensor and the seat rail is within 1.1 mm (0.043 in.) to 1.9 mm (0.075 in.).

s2.ptxt: Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), tighten the "torx" screw to install the seat position sensor.
Make sure that a clearance between the seat position sensor and the seat rail is within 1.1 mm (0.043 in.) to 1.9 mm (0.075 in.).
Check that there is no looseness in the installation parts of the seat position sensor.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT LOWER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD
INSTALL FRONT LOWER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD LH
INSTALL SEAT RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER LH
INSTALL SEAT RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER RH
INSTALL RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER LH
INSTALL RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER RH
INSTALL LUMBAR SUPPORT ADJUSTER ASSEMBLY
INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for Except Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the front separate type seat back cover to the front seat back pad with 16 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the front separate type seat back cover to the front seat back pad with 14 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Fully cover the airbag with the 2 seat back cover brackets and tighten the nut.

item.ptxt: For vehicles with side airbags, the seat back cover must be securely installed. Otherwise, the side airbags may not deploy properly.
Make sure that the strap is not twisted after installing the bracket.

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install 2 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT
INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT
INSTALL FRONT SEAT BACK BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY
INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER (for Except Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the front separate type seat cushion cover to the front separate type seat pad with 16 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER (for Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the front separate type seat cushion cover to the front separate type seat pad with 17 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY
INSTALL FRONT POWER SEAT SWITCH
INSTALL LOWER SEAT TRACK SPACER
INSTALL FRONT INNER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD
INSTALL FRONT LUMBAR POWER SEAT SWITCH
INSTALL FRONT SEAT INNER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front seat inner belt assembly with the nut.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the front seat inner belt assembly to overlap the protruding parts of the front seat adjuster.

s3.ptxt: Connect the connectors and engage the 4 clamps.
Connect the connector and engage the 3 clamps.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT INNER NO. 1 SEAT CUSHION SHIELD
INSTALL FRONT SEAT CUSHION SHIELD ASSEMBLY
INSTALL SLIDE AND VERTICAL POWER SEAT SWITCH KNOB
INSTALL RECLINING POWER SEAT SWITCH KNOB
